login.title: Merchant Login
login.description: Paste your dashboard token to sign in.

register.title: Register Merchant
register.securityDesc: Do not use your personal wallet. Create a brand new wallet exclusively for your store, and use its viewing key here. Sweep funds to cold storage regularly.
register.ufvkHelp: Read-only key for payment detection. Cannot spend funds.
register.emailHelp: Only used for account recovery if you lose your token. No marketing, ever.
register.successDesc: Save these credentials now. They will not be shown again.
register.apiKeyHelp: Use this in your server code to create invoices. Never expose it in frontend code.
register.dashTokenHelp: This is your login password for the dashboard. You'll need it every time you sign in.
register.webhookSecretHelp: Used to verify that incoming webhooks are from CipherPay. Add it to your server config.
register.credentialsWarning: THESE CREDENTIALS ARE SHOWN ONCE. COPY THEM TO A SAFE PLACE.

recover.title: Account Recovery
recover.description: Enter the recovery email you registered with. We'll send a link to get a new dashboard token.
recover.sentDesc: If an account with that email exists, a recovery link has been sent. Check your inbox and click the link within 1 hour.
recover.noEmailDesc: Without one, you'll need to create a new merchant account with a different UFVK.
